creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Bartek Rutkowski from comment #4)
> The patch you've submitted fails to apply cleanly to the port revision
> 376971. Could you please send updated patch, so I could test it and commit
> once it is OK?

What do you mean, it doesn't patch cleanly?
It's only been 90 days. ;) ;)
Ahem...
OK now that I got that out of my system. :)
Please find a new patch against revision 379722
as 2015-02-23.diff, attached.

Tested, it patches cleanly.

Thanks, Bartek Rutkowski.

--Chris
